info.description: ERP Ready Backend for Meta Ads & Business Management
info.title: Ads Backend API

get.description: Get a list of alerts with pagination and filters
Get an alert by its ID
Get a list of whitelist rules for a brand

post.description: Create a new whitelist rule for a brand
Check if a URL is allowed by the whitelist rules

get.description: Get a whitelist rule by its ID
Get a paginated list of brands

post.description: Create a new brand with optional photo upload

get.description: Get details of a specific brand by Slug

put.description: Update an existing brand with optional photo upload

get.description: Get a list of fraud logs with pagination and filters
Get a fraud log by its ID

put.description: Mark a fraud log as resolved

get.description: Retrieve all ad accounts associated with the system user token

put.description: Assign a brand to multiple Meta ad accounts (or unassign if brand_id is null)
put.summary: Assign or Unassign Brand to Ad Accounts

get.description: Get unique business options available in ad accounts
Get paginated list of Meta ad accounts that are not assigned to any brand

put.description: Disconnect a brand from a specific Meta ad account

get.description: Retrieve ads from local database (synced from Meta)
Retrieve adsets from local database (synced from Meta)
Get paginated list of Meta ad accounts for a specific brand
Retrieve campaigns from local database (synced from Meta)

parameters.description: Ad Account ID (falls back to config.MetaAdAccountID)
parameters.name: ad_account_id

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific ad creative from the local database (synced from Meta)
Returns ads with performance metrics joined from insights
Returns ad sets with performance metrics joined from insights
Returns aggregated metrics for each brand (ad account count, active campaign count, total spends)
Returns campaigns with performance metrics (spend, impressions, reach, actions) joined from insights and adsets

parameters.description: Filter by campaign status (ACTIVE, PAUSED, etc)
parameters.name: status

get.description: Retrieve ad-level insights from local database (synced from Meta)
Retrieve campaign-level insights from local database (synced from Meta)

post.description: Manually trigger a full Meta Ads sync. Returns immediately; subscribe to the Centrifugo channel for real-time progress.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of sync batches ordered by most recent first.
Returns a single sync batch with its steps.
Returns whether a sync job is currently running.

Retrieve all roles with permissions

Retrieve all users
